disclaimer: Trigram affinities are a modern synthesis, not classical practice — a prompt scaffold for advisors. Affinity suggests; staleness and mission-weight decide.

steps: Read the draw (hexagrams, changing lines, practitioner's advisory summary).
Shortlist 1-3 surfaces; trigram affinities are hints, not rules.
Check each surface's signals before recommending; evidence, not vibes.
If a tracker is missing or stale, recommend building/refreshing the tracker, never more activity.
Per surface output: signal checked + what it showed, ONE next action, one-line mission tie-back.

surfaces.name: Origin & Restoration
surfaces.scope: Trees, farms, Matheus/Brazil ops, ERA/BEC tree issuance — the mission itself
surfaces.mission_link: This surface IS the mission: hectares restored, trees in the ground.
signals: tree-planting ledger events in the Telegram pulse (ADVISORY_SNAPSHOT)

surfaces.name: Supply Line
surfaces.scope: AGL shipments, freight, customs, FSVP, Próspera export entity
surfaces.mission_link: Moves the harvest that funds restoration.
surfaces.staleness_hint: shipment in transit with no status change in 14 days

surfaces.name: Inventory & Ledger Integrity
surfaces.scope: Main Ledger, conversions/repackaging, QR serialization, double-entry health
surfaces.mission_link: Trustworthy books are why anyone believes the hectares.

surfaces.name: Commerce (online)
surfaces.scope: agroverse.shop, Stripe, Merchant Center, restock recommender
surfaces.mission_link: Direct revenue line from cacao to restoration.
signals: [SALES EVENT] stream in the Telegram pulse
surfaces.staleness_hint: days since last online sale event

surfaces.name: Retail Partner Network
surfaces.scope: Hit List funnel, partner check-ins, velocity, restocks
surfaces.mission_link: Each shelf is a recurring revenue node and a story outpost.
signals: Hit List statuses + pipeline-metrics block in ADVISORY_SNAPSHOT
surfaces.staleness_hint: partners without a check-in in 30 days

surfaces.name: Community & Programs
surfaces.scope: capoeira, BEC, grounding, Aora, credentialing pipeline, cohorts
surfaces.mission_link: Grows the human lineage that sustains the mission beyond any one person.
signals: [PRACTICE EVENT] / attestation stream in the Telegram pulse
surfaces.staleness_hint: programs with zero practice events in 14 days

surfaces.name: Treasury & Governance
surfaces.scope: TDG, managed ledgers, proposals/amendments, trading-dashboard runway
surfaces.mission_link: Stewards what has been gathered so the mission survives volatility.
surfaces.staleness_hint: goals pacing behind in goal-progress block

surfaces.name: Content & Reach
surfaces.scope: blog, YouTube, newsletter, LLM discovery surface
surfaces.mission_link: Widens the circle of people who can find and join the mission.

surfaces.name: Infra & Agent Health
surfaces.scope: Edgar, GAS fleet, Sophia herself, AWS costs, credential vault
surfaces.mission_link: Keeps every other surface standing; quiet when healthy.
signals: GH Action failure emails (already polled by Sophia)
surfaces.staleness_hint: any red monit check; failure email unactioned 48h

surfaces.name: Frontier
surfaces.scope: China/Aora launch, Kosovo GO, Krake browser, new bets — open loops not yet in any pipeline
surfaces.mission_link: Where the next surfaces 1-8 come from.
levers: the next irreversible step on each open loop
surfaces.staleness_hint: a tracker whose RESUME pointer hasn't moved in 14 days
